chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-471 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 10-07-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Junaid Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for the complainant Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length submits that he does not press the instant bail application if direction is given to the trial court for conclusion of trial within two months. Learned APG and counsel for the complainant do not oppose the proposal. Accordingly, instant bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, learned trial court is directed to proceed with the matter expeditiously and decide the same within two months after receipt of this order. If the trial is not concluded within the period mentioned above, the applicant shall be at liberty to prefer another bail application before the trial court, who shall decide the same on its merits. JUDGE SulemenKhan/PA
